001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
004import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.Set;
007
008public final class BatchCardSummaryFormatter {
009
010  private static final String BREED_PENDING = "Breed pending";
011  private static final int MAX_VISIBLE_BREEDS = 2;
012
013  private BatchCardSummaryFormatter() {
014  }
015
016  public static String buildBreedSummary(List<EggGroup> groups) {
017    if (groups == null || groups.isEmpty()) {
018      return BREED_PENDING;
019    }
020
021    Set<String> distinctBreeds = new LinkedHashSet<>();
022
023    for (EggGroup group : groups) {
024      if (group == null) {
025        continue;
026      }
027      String breed = group.getBreed();
028      if (breed != null) {
029        String normalized = breed.trim();
030        if (!normalized.isBlank()) {
031          distinctBreeds.add(normalized);
032        }
033      }
034    }
035
036    if (distinctBreeds.isEmpty()) {
037      return BREED_PENDING;
038    }
039
040    List<String> breeds = List.copyOf(distinctBreeds);
041
042    if (breeds.size() == 1) {
043      return breeds.get(0);
044    }
045
046    if (breeds.size() <= MAX_VISIBLE_BREEDS) {
047      return String.join(", ", breeds);
048    }
049
050    int remaining = breeds.size() - MAX_VISIBLE_BREEDS;
051    return breeds.get(0) + ", " + breeds.get(1) + " +" + remaining;
052  }
053}
